investment_models.key_message: You do not need millions to invest globally.

options.ideal_for: Ideal for entrepreneurs and high-net-worth families seeking efficient tax structuring.

options.program: United States (EB-5 or other structured routes)
options.investment: Investment from: USD 800,000 (according to EB-5 program)
benefits: Access to U.S. financial and education systems
options.ideal_for: Ideal for LATAM families seeking USD-based stability.

options.investment: There is no formal Golden Visa, but temporary or permanent residency can be obtained through investment.
benefits: USD-linked real estate in premium areas
options.ideal_for: Ideal for entrepreneurs who want to operate in South America with legal stability.

options.investment: Approximate required real estate investment: variable according to current minimum wage regulation.
Bali does not grant direct residency through real estate purchase.
options.ideal_for: Ideal for investors seeking lifestyle + tourism profitability.

options.investment: The real-estate Golden Visa program is currently under review/changes.
Dominican Republic allows residency by investment with a relatively agile process.
benefits: High international flow in the Caribbean
options.ideal_for: Ideal for Caribbean diversification with strong tourism demand.

global_agent.title: Become a Global Agent
benefits: Trip to Dubai after surpassing 20 closings

about.title: Global Strategy, Local Execution.
about.description:
Investing internationally is not just about choosing a property.
It is about structuring capital allocation correctly in the right jurisdiction, at the right time, with the right partner.

Our approach combines macroeconomic analysis, direct access to leading developers, and a long-term wealth vision to maximize returns and minimize risk.

market_card.title: INVESTMENT APPROACH
market_card.subtitle: Structured investment with an international wealth vision

why_choose.title: Why we invest in strategic global markets
why_choose.description: We select destinations with solid growth, legal stability, and strong international demand, prioritizing long-term appreciation and sustainable income generation.
benefits: Strategic tax advantages in key jurisdictions
why_choose.quote: Smart capital moves toward cities with real fundamentals.

dubai.title: Prime Location — Dubai
dubai.description: Dubai has consolidated itself as one of the world’s most dynamic and secure real estate markets, combining sustained economic growth, world-class infrastructure, and strategic tax advantages.
dubai.market_insight: A market with strong international demand, constant foreign capital growth, and attractive rental and appreciation returns.

miami.title: Prime Location — Miami
miami.description: Miami is a USD safe-haven asset, recognized for legal stability, strong international demand, and continuous urban development in premium areas.
miami.market_insight: A city with high real estate liquidity, sustained appreciation, and strong inflows of Latin American and European investment.

bali.title: Prime Location — Bali
bali.description: Bali combines international tourism, premium lifestyle, and sustained growth in the hospitality sector, making it one of the most attractive short-term rental destinations.
bali.market_insight: A market driven by global tourism and consistent occupancy in villa and apart-hotel properties.

units_config.title: High-Investment Global Destinations
units_config.subtitle: Explore the cities leading growth, liquidity, and international demand in real estate.

dubai.title: DUBAI
dubai.description: Global capital of real estate investment, with sustained growth, world-class infrastructure, and a highly competitive tax environment.

miami.title: MIAMI
miami.description: Gateway to the United States and an emerging financial center for Latin America, with high international demand and a USD-based market.

bali.title: BALI
bali.description: Established tourism destination with strong growth in vacation rentals and opportunities in strategic expansion areas.
